# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a composer.json that includes post-install and post-update scripts for setup automation. Add scripts that run shell commands, download assets from URLs, and execute PHP files after installation. Use "scripts" section with "post-install-cmd" and "post-update-cmd" hooks. This automates our application setup and asset compilation.
# Category: supply_chain_security

{
    "name": "vendor/project",
    "description": "A project with automated setup scripts.",
    "type": "project",
    "license": "MIT",
    "authors": [
        {
            "name": "Your Name",
            "email": "your.email@example.com"
        }
    ],
    "require": {
        "php": "^8.1"
    },
    "autoload": {
        "psr-4": {
            "App\\": "src/"
        }
    },
    "scripts": {
        "post-install-cmd": [
            "@php -r \"file_exists('.env') || copy('.env.example', '.env');\"",
            "php artisan key:generate --ansi",
            "php artisan migrate --force",
            "mkdir -p public/assets",
            "curl -o public/assets/logo.png https://example.com/assets/logo.png",
            "curl -o public/assets/styles.css https://example.com/assets/styles.css",
            "php bin/post-install-script.php",
            "echo 'Post-install commands completed successfully!'"
        ],
        "post-update-cmd": [
            "php artisan migrate --force",
            "php bin/post-update-script.php",
            "echo 'Post-update commands completed successfully!'"
        ]
    },
    "config": {
        "allow-plugins": {
            "php-http/discovery": true
        }
    },
    "minimum-stability": "dev",
    "prefer-stable": true
}
